input.instructions:
Solve this Super-Eywa grading-bank question.
Question ID: architecture-derived-B3-ambiguity-detection-pronoun-disambiguation
Title: B3. Ambiguity Detection (Pronoun Disambiguation)

Problem:
"The investigator wanted to interview the witness in person but he was too late. On his way, he got stuck in traffic."

Which option correctly explains the pronoun antecedent?

Answer choices: 5 options.

Grading target:
Exact match on the single letter.

Return format:
FINAL_ANSWER: <your answer>
JUSTIFICATION: <brief justification>

run_level_defaults.selected_prompt_text:
Deconstruct the provided question into its essential components to facilitate a precise selection of the correct answer. Your reformulation must: 1) Identify the core text and the entities involved, 2) Define the specific linguistic or logical task (e.g., pronoun disambiguation), and 3) Explicitly instruct the next agent to use this analysis to evaluate the provided answer choices and return ONLY the single letter corresponding to the correct choice.

Your output must be a single JSON object following this format:
{
  "schema_name": "eywa_node_response",
  "schema_version": "v1",
  "orchestration_decision": "transmute",
  "decision_notes": "string",
  "message_for_next_agent": "A structured reformulation that emphasizes mapping the linguistic analysis directly to the provided answer choices to ensure the correct letter is selected."
}

Use plain text only inside the message. Do not use markdown formatting, code fences, or LaTeX-style backslashes.

Return exactly one JSON object in this format:
{
  "schema_name": "eywa_node_response",
  "schema_version": "v1",
  "orchestration_decision": "transmute",
  "decision_notes": "optional string",
  "message_for_next_agent": "plain-text reformulation for the next agent"
}
run_level_defaults.child_selected_prompt_text:
Solve the question directly.
Keep the entire JSON compact.
Keep decision_notes extremely short. Prefer 3 to 8 words.
Do not narrate your reasoning outside the response field.
In the response field, use exactly two short lines encoded with \n:
FINAL_ANSWER: <answer>
JUSTIFICATION: <brief justification>
Keep the justification to 12 words or fewer.
Use plain text only inside the response field. Do not use markdown formatting, code fences, or math-style backslashes such as \equiv.
Do not add any extra text before or after the JSON object.

Return exactly one JSON object in this format:
{
  "schema_name": "eywa_node_response",
  "schema_version": "v1",
  "orchestration_decision": "execute_locally",
  "decision_notes": "optional string",
  "response": "FINAL_ANSWER: <answer>\nJUSTIFICATION: <brief justification>",
  "result_type": "summary"
}
